prompt: Show me all accounts with converted leads
query_text: SELECT ACCOUNTID, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_TO_LEAD_CONVERSION FROM BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_SALESFORCE WHERE ACCOUNT_TO_LEAD_CONVERSION = TRUE
SELECT INDUSTRY, COUNT(DISTINCT ACCOUNTID) AS ACCOUNT_COUNT FROM BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_SALESFORCE GROUP BY INDUSTRY ORDER BY ACCOUNT_COUNT DESC

prompt: Active contracts with ARR greater than 100k
query_text: SELECT CONTRACT_NAME, CONTRACT_STATUS, TOTAL_CONTRACT_VALUE FROM BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_SALESFORCE WHERE CONTRACT_STATUS = 'Activated' AND TOTAL_CONTRACT_VALUE > 100000
SELECT a.ACCOUNTID, a.ACCOUNT_NAME, o.OPPORTUNITY_NAME, o.ARR FROM BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_SALESFORCE a JOIN BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_OPPORTUNITIES o ON a.ACCOUNTID = o.ACCOUNTID WHERE o.IS_WON = TRUE

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CLOSE_DATE) AS ARR_MONTH, SUM(ARR) AS TOTAL_ARR FROM BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_SALESFORCE WHERE CLOSE_DATE BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31' AND IS_WON = TRUE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

prompt: Accounts with both leads and open opps
query_text: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ACCOUNTID) FROM OBT_SALESFORCE WHERE LEADID IS NOT NULL

prompt: Top 10 accounts by total contract value
query_text: SELECT ACCOUNTID, ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(TOTAL_CONTRACT_VALUE) AS TOTAL_TCV FROM BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_SALESFORCE WHERE CONTRACT_STATUS IN ('Activated','Signed') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY TOTAL_TCV DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT WORKSPACE_ID, SUM(RECIPE_RUNS) AS TOTAL_RUNS FROM DATA_GENIE.WORKATO_USAGE.AGGREGATED_RECIPES_OVER_TIME_COMB WHERE SNAPSHOT_DATE >= '2024-10-01' GROUP BY WORKSPACE_ID
SELECT LEADID, ACCOUNT_NAME, CONVERTED_DATE FROM BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_SALESFORCE WHERE ACCOUNT_TO_LEAD_CONVERSION = TRUE AND CONVERTED_DATE >= '2024-10-01' AND CONVERTED_DATE < '2025-01-01'
SELECT STAGE_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT CONVERTEDOPPORTUNITYID) AS OPP_COUNT, SUM(ARR) AS PIPELINE_ARR FROM BT_DEV.PCHOPRA.OBT_SALESFORCE WHERE IS_WON = FALSE AND IS_CLOSED = FALSE GROUP BY STAGE_NAME
